task: For each of the following countries—Singapore, United Kingdom, Australia, Canada, New Zealand, and Ireland—visit the official Apple Music and Spotify websites to find the current subscription prices in local currencies for their Student and Individual plans. Exclude free trials, promotional offers, or any other temporary discounts. Include direct links to each country's official Apple Music and Spotify plan pricing pages.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed all aspects of the task. It accurately identified the required countries, services (Apple Music and Spotify), and plan types (Student and Individual). For each combination, it navigated to the correct official pricing page, extracted the current subscription prices in local currencies, and correctly excluded free trials and promotional offers by identifying the 'after X months' pricing. The agent also provided direct links to each country's official pricing pages as requested. The use of parallel tab opening was efficient, and the agent demonstrated good problem-solving by correcting a variable declaration error and adapting its snapshot extraction method to ensure all pricing details were captured. The final output is well-structured and complete, meeting all user requirements.
